_note: M5a golden inputs (RFC-008 §validate-plugin-registry assertion 9). Each command MUST classify to the stated non-overridable label through any plugin's override classifier; if an override suppresses or remaps either label, the registry validator fails. Staged in P0; exercised at P1/P3.

cases.rationale: writes a .checkpoints/.* marker at a canonical path
removes a marker file (deadlock escape hatch)
